title: Leetcode 994. Rotting Oranges
shortDescription: Given an m×n grid with empty cells, fresh (1) and rotten (2) oranges, compute the minimum minutes until all fresh oranges become rotten as rot spreads 4-directionally each minute, returning -1 if any fresh orange is unreachable. This is a multi-source BFS/level-order propagation problem starting from all initial rotten oranges.

Leetcode 994. Rotting Oranges

Given an m×n grid with empty cells, fresh (1) and rotten (2) oranges, compute the minimum minutes until all fresh oranges become rotten as rot spreads 4-directionally each minute, returning -1 if any fresh orange is unreachable. This is a multi-source BFS/level-order propagation problem starting from all initial rotten oranges.
